title: ACADIA Pharma Q1 2022 Earnings Preview
text: ACADIA Pharma Q1 2022 Earnings Preview. Q1 2022 consensus EPS estimate: -$0.60. Consensus revenue estimate: $122.22M (+14.7% Y/Y). ACADIA Pharmaceuticals was scheduled to announce Q1 earnings results on May 4, 2022, after market close. Looking back at the previous five quarters, ACAD had beaten EPS estimates 40% of the time and beaten revenue estimates 20% of the time, suggesting a pattern of meeting or slightly missing expectations during this period. The company faced macroeconomic headwinds in 2022 but maintained focus on NUPLAZID sales growth. Market conditions were challenging for biopharmaceutical companies in early 2022.
